nasb.text: Who has measured the waters in the hollow of His hand, And marked off the heavens by the span, And calculated the dust of the earth by the measure, And weighed the mountains in a balance And the hills in a pair of scales?

esv.text: Who has measured the waters in the hollow of his hand and marked off the heavens with a span, enclosed the dust of the earth in a measure and weighed the mountains in scales and the hills in a balance?

cnv.text: 誰曾用掌心量過海水， 用手掌測過蒼天呢？ 誰曾用升斗量過大地的塵土， 用秤稱山嶺， 用天平稱岡陵呢？

ccb.text: 谁曾用手心量海水？ 谁曾用手掌度苍天？ 谁曾用升斗盛大地的尘土？ 谁曾用秤称高山，用天平称丘陵？

csbs.text: 谁曾用手心测量众水， 用手掌度量诸天呢？ 谁曾用升斗盛量大地的尘土， 用秤称量群山，用天平称量冈陵呢？
